title: Beyond Cruxes
description:
Cruxes carried you through the early industrial age, but even automated pots have limits.

The Planting Station from Mekanism More Machines abandons the quaint idea of "reasonable production" entirely. By supporting multiple seeds and powerful upgrades, it transforms essence farming into a fully industrial operation capable of flooding your storage network with resources faster than you can pretend this economy is balanced.

Build a Planting Station and take your agriculture from sustainable farming to outright resource manufacturing.
